meaning: n.死水,停滞不进的状态或地方
examples: Here's our backwater at last, where we're going to lunch.
I came up this backwater to try and get a moment's peace, and then stumble upon you fellows!
Today the backwater has turned into Niagara Falls.
The international port of Tangier in those years, in comparison, seems like a provincial backwater.
The house is on a lake in central Mississippi near the backwater-flooded Yazoo River.
